Details: A combination of hydrogen peroxide and electrochemically-generated iron was found to be effecitve for the oxidation of malathion based on the results of one study. In that study, 60 to 80 percent removal was achieved in 2 hours.  Adding the hydrogen peroxide slowly over the course of the treatment rather than all at that beginning of each treatment greatly improved performance of the process (99 percent in 2 hours). [732]
